title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Cars24

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Category Manager at Cars24
jsonLd.description:
Cars24 invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Meerut location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Cars24:
Cars24 is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Cars24!
